persons_entitled.name: The Council of the City of Plymouth

particulars.description: The chargor, with full title guarantee, charges by way of legal mortgage, in favour of the lender, all of the property, being the freehold property known as 45 citadel road, plymouth, PL1 3AU registered at the land registry with title number DN369803, in which the chargor has an interest on the date of this deed as security for the payment and discharge of the secured obligations.. The chargor, with full title guarantee, charges by way of fixed charge, in favour of the lender, all of the chargor’s rights, title and interest from time to time in and to each of the following assets, as security for the payment and discharge of the secured obligations; its property; and all of the chargor’s rights, title and interest in the intellectual property.. Please see charge document for more details.
